ast.target: 启动 Obsidian 时打开主基地

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When navigating away from the home base, restore the default view
ast.target: 从主基地导航离开时，恢复默认视图

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When opening the home base, scroll to the bottom and focus on the last line
ast.target: 打开主基地时，滚动到底部并聚焦到最后一行

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Never display release notes when Obsidian updates
ast.target: Obsidian 更新时永不显示更新说明

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When you close all tabs, automatically open the home base
ast.target: 关闭所有标签页时，自动打开主基地

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When to replace new tabs (only when no tabs are open, or always)
ast.target: 何时替换新标签页（仅当没有标签页打开时，或总是）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Configure a different home base to open for new tabs (instead of the main home base)
ast.target: 为新标签页配置不同的主基地（而不是主主基地）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What to open for new tabs

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a home icon in the tab bar that stays pinned to the left (desktop only)
ast.target: 在标签栏中显示一个固定在左侧的主基地图标（仅限桌面端）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The icon to display in the sticky home icon
ast.target: 固定主基地图标中显示的图标

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide the sticky home tab header when it's open, using the sticky icon as the tab indicator
ast.target: 当固定主基地标签页打开时，隐藏其标题，使用固定图标作为标签页指示器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use a different home base on mobile devices
ast.target: 在移动设备上使用不同的主基地

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What to open as your home base on mobile
ast.target: 在移动设备上设置为您的主基地的内容

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change the mobile new tab button to a home icon
ast.target: 将移动设备的新标签页按钮更改为主基地图标

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use a different new tab file on mobile devices
ast.target: 在移动设备上使用不同的新标签页文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What to open for new tabs on mobile
ast.target: 移动设备新标签页打开的内容

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run an Obsidian command when opening home base
ast.target: 打开主基地时运行 Obsidian 命令

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wait before creating periodic or journal notes to allow Git sync to finish pulling existing notes. Only applies when a note doesn't already exist.
ast.target: 创建周期性或日记笔记前等待，以便 Git 同步完成拉取现有笔记。仅适用于笔记尚不存在的情况。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait for Git sync to finish before creating a new note
ast.target: 创建新笔记前等待 Git 同步完成的时间

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open home base when all tabs are closed
ast.target: 所有标签页关闭时打开主基地

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use different home base for new tabs
ast.target: 为新标签页使用不同的主基地

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 替换移动新标签页按钮

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Home Base] Could not resolve path for new tab:

ast.source: [Home Base] Failed to patch opening behavior:

ast.source: [Home Base] Failed to patch release notes:
ast.target: [主基地] 修补更新说明失败：

ast.target: 未配置主基地。请在设置中设置一个。
